ddls:
CREATE TABLE "passengers" (
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each passenger */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the passenger */,
  "passport_number" TEXT /* Passport number of the passenger */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number for emergency */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address for communication */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the passenger */,
  "travel_history" TEXT /* Travel history of the passenger */,
  "loyalty_program_member" INTEGER /* Indicates if the passenger is a loyalty program member */,
  "preferred_activities" TEXT /* Preferred activities of the passenger */,
  "dietary_preferences" TEXT /* Dietary preferences of the passenger */,
  "medical_conditions" TEXT /* Medical conditions of the passenger */,
  "cabin_number" TEXT /* Cabin number of the passenger */,
  "travel_agency" TEXT /* Travel agency that booked the cruise */,
  "age_categories_missing" INTEGER /* Indicates if age is missing (1 for missing, 0 for not missing) */,
  "age_categories_infant" INTEGER /* Indicates if the passenger is an infant (1 for infant, 0 for not infant) */,
  "age_categories_child" INTEGER /* Indicates if the passenger is a child (1 for child, 0 for not child) */,
  "age_categories_teenager" INTEGER /* Indicates if the passenger is a teenager (1 for teenager, 0 for not teenager) */,
  "age_categories_young_adult" INTEGER /* Indicates if the passenger is a young adult (1 for young adult, 0 for not young adult) */,
  "age_categories_adult" INTEGER /* Indicates if the passenger is an adult (1 for adult, 0 for not adult) */,
  "age_categories_senior" INTEGER /* Indicates if the passenger is a senior (1 for senior, 0 for not senior) */,
  "pclass_1" INTEGER /* Indicates if the passenger is in 1st class (1 for 1st class, 0 for not 1st class) */,
  "pclass_2" INTEGER /* Indicates if the passenger is in 2nd class (1 for 2nd class, 0 for not 2nd class) */,
  "pclass_3" INTEGER /* Indicates if the passenger is in 3rd class (1 for 3rd class, 0 for not 3rd class) */,
  "sex_female" INTEGER /* Indicates if the passenger is female (1 for female, 0 for not female) */,
  "sex_male" INTEGER /* Indicates if the passenger is male (1 for male, 0 for not male) */,
  "embarked_c" INTEGER /* Indicates if the passenger embarked at Cherbourg (1 for Cherbourg, 0 for not Cherbourg) */,
  "embarked_q" INTEGER /* Indicates if the passenger embarked at Queenstown (1 for Queenstown, 0 for not Queenstown) */,
  "embarked_s" INTEGER /* Indicates if the passenger embarked at Southampton (1 for Southampton, 0 for not Southampton) */,
  "sibsp_scaled" REAL /* Scaled number of siblings/spouses traveling with the passenger */,
  "parch_scaled" REAL /* Scaled number of parents/children traveling with the passenger */,
  "fare_scaled" REAL /* Scaled fare paid by the passenger */,
  "fare_categories_0_12" INTEGER /* Indicates if the fare is in the 0-12 range (1 for 0-12, 0 for not 0-12) */,
  "fare_categories_12_50" INTEGER /* Indicates if the fare is in the 12-50 range (1 for 12-50, 0 for not 12-50) */,
  "fare_categories_50_100" INTEGER /* Indicates if the fare is in the 50-100 range (1 for 50-100, 0 for not 50-100) */,
  "fare_categories_100_plus" INTEGER /* Indicates if the fare is in the 100+ range (1 for 100+, 0 for not 100+) */,
  "title_master" INTEGER /* Indicates if the passenger's title is Master (1 for Master, 0 for not Master) */,
  "title_miss" INTEGER /* Indicates if the passenger's title is Miss (1 for Miss, 0 for not Miss) */,
  "title_mr" INTEGER /* Indicates if the passenger's title is Mr (1 for Mr, 0 for not Mr) */,
  "title_mrs" INTEGER /* Indicates if the passenger's title is Mrs (1 for Mrs, 0 for not Mrs) */,
  "title_officer" INTEGER /* Indicates if the passenger's title is Officer (1 for Officer, 0 for not Officer) */,
  "title_royalty" INTEGER /* Indicates if the passenger's title is Royalty (1 for Royalty, 0 for not Royalty) */,
  "cabin_type_a" INTEGER /* Indicates if the passenger's cabin type is A (1 for A, 0 for not A) */,
  "cabin_type_b" INTEGER /* Indicates if the passenger's cabin type is B (1 for B, 0 for not B) */,
  "cabin_type_c" INTEGER /* Indicates if the passenger's cabin type is C (1 for C, 0 for not C) */,
  "cabin_type_d" INTEGER /* Indicates if the passenger's cabin type is D (1 for D, 0 for not D) */,
  "cabin_type_e" INTEGER /* Indicates if the passenger's cabin type is E (1 for E, 0 for not E) */,
  "cabin_type_f" INTEGER /* Indicates if the passenger's cabin type is F (1 for F, 0 for not F) */,
  "cabin_type_g" INTEGER /* Indicates if the passenger's cabin type is G (1 for G, 0 for not G) */,
  "cabin_type_t" INTEGER /* Indicates if the passenger's cabin type is T (1 for T, 0 for not T) */,
  "cabin_type_unknown" INTEGER /* Indicates if the passenger's cabin type is unknown (1 for unknown, 0 for not unknown) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("passenger_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_passengers_embarked_q FOREIGN KEY ("embarked_q") REFERENCES embarkation_points ("point_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_passengers_age_categories_adult FOREIGN KEY ("age_categories_adult") REFERENCES age_categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_passengers_age_categories_infant FOREIGN KEY ("age_categories_infant") REFERENCES age_categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_passengers_age_categories_young_adult FOREIGN KEY ("age_categories_young_adult") REFERENCES age_categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_passengers_pclass_1 FOREIGN KEY ("pclass_1") REFERENCES travel_classes ("class_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_passengers_age_categories_missing FOREIGN KEY ("age_categories_missing") REFERENCES age_categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_passengers_embarked_s FOREIGN KEY ("embarked_s") REFERENCES embarkation_points ("point_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_passengers_age_categories_senior FOREIGN KEY ("age_categories_senior") REFERENCES age_categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_passengers_age_categories_teenager FOREIGN KEY ("age_categories_teenager") REFERENCES age_categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_passengers_pclass_2 FOREIGN KEY ("pclass_2") REFERENCES travel_classes ("class_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_passengers_embarked_c FOREIGN KEY ("embarked_c") REFERENCES embarkation_points ("point_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_passengers_age_categories_child FOREIGN KEY ("age_categories_child") REFERENCES age_categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_passengers_pclass_3 FOREIGN KEY ("pclass_3") REFERENCES travel_classes ("class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "age_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each age category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the age category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the age category */,
  "min_age" INTEGER /* Minimum age for the category */,
  "max_age" INTEGER /* Maximum age for the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "travel_classes" (
  "class_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each travel class */,
  "class_name" TEXT /* Name of the travel class */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the travel class */,
  "price_range" TEXT /* Typical fare range for the class */,
  "amenities" TEXT /* Amenities included in the class */,
  "deck" TEXT /* Deck where the cabins are located */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "embarkation_points" (
  "point_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each embarkation point */,
  "point_name" TEXT /* Name of the embarkation point */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the embarkation point */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographical location of the embarkation point */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the embarkation point */,
  "facilities" TEXT /* Facilities available at the embarkation point */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("point_id")
)
